message.content:
@startuml
title RqP - Request Resource

actor "Requesting Party (RqP)" as RqP

participant "Client Application (CA)\n«Custom Application»" as CA
participant "Resource Server (RS)\n«Custom Application»" as RS
participant "Authorization Server (AS)\nForgeRock Access Manager" as AS
participant "Content Server (CS)\n«Custom Application»" as CS

CA -> CA : User Interface
RS -> RS : REST API
RS -> RS : Resource
RS -> RS : Credential
AS -> AS : AM API
AS -> AS : UMA API
AS -> AS : OAuth API
CS -> CS : REST API
CS -> CS : Data

RqP -> AS : Authenticate
AS --> RqP : Authenticated

RqP -> CA : Access Interface
CA -> CA : Obtain Resource Id\n(maybe from Discover Resources)
CA -> RS : GET /share/resources/{resourceId}\nscopes (no valid RPT)

RS -> RS : Get_id
RS --> RS : meta data
RS -> AS : Get PAT
AS --> RS : PAT

CA -> AS : Get permission ticket for the resource and scope
AS -> AS : POST /am/uma/permission_request\nresource_id + scopes
AS --> CA : permission ticket

CA -> CA : permission ticket + AS URI
CA -> AS : Get client auth basic
AS -> AS : POST /am/oauth2/access_token\nscope=openid\nSSO session
AS --> CA : claim token

CA -> AS : Get Requesting Party Token (RPT)\nusing the permission ticket and claim token
AS -> AS : POST /am/oauth2/access_token\ngrant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:uma-ticket\nscope=..., ticket=..., claim_token=..., claim_token_format=...
AS -> AS : Check Access
AS -> AS : No Policy for RqP + Resource + scopes\nCreate Access Request for Resource Owner
AS --> AS : No Access, request Submitted

CA --> RqP : Error: Request Submitted

@enduml
